title: Risk factors, comorbidities and coinfections signs and symptoms ValueSet Schema
description: JSON Schema for Risk factors, comorbidities and coinfections signs and symptoms ValueSet ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.
narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the Risk factors, comorbidities and coinfections signs and symptoms ValueSet ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/hiv/ValueSet-HIV.D.DE259.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
